# chooseFilenames(_:)

**Instance Method**

Displays a file open panel and returns the multiple selected filenames.

## Declaration

```swift
func chooseFilenames(_ fileNames: [Any]!)
```

## Parameters

- **fileNames**: An array of selected file names.

## Setting a File Name

- **chooseFilename(_:)**: Displays a file open panel and returns the selected filename.
